user_system_path: Master Audit #445, Pass 3 (Cost & unit economics). Cross-checked real spend read-only (cost_events/api_usage): actual COGS is $0.02-0.19/user/day vs $0.97/user/day revenue — healthy at current scale. Shipped P0.1: reverted EXTRACTION_DAILY_CAP default 4 -> 0.25 (lib/utils/api-tracker.ts), the un-reverted 2026-04-09 16x landmine, locked by tests/cost/__tests__/extraction-cap.test.ts. New finding C-2 (directive_retry costs more than directive) routed to Pass 4. Verdict CONCERN: bleed stopped + reality healthy, but worst-case-under-revenue + users-by-days shape need P0.2 lazy generation (deferred follow-on seam). Constraint: NO paid API calls.
allowed_files_raw: Pass 3 ships the safe P0.1 extraction-cap revert (lib/utils/api-tracker.ts) + its test + the live cost cross-check doc + control-plane. Only the one named lib file may change; the architectural P0.2/P0.3 are separate seams.
forbidden_files_raw: No app/api, schema, or deps changes in Pass 3. Lazy-generation (P0.2) and selective extraction (P0.3) are deferred to their own seams with paid validation.
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npx vitest run tests/cost/__tests__/extraction-cap.test.ts && npm run typecheck
required_browser_proof: N/A — single cost-cap constant + test + cross-check doc; no user-facing surface changed.
acceptance_condition: EXTRACTION_DAILY_CAP default is 0.25 (locked by tests/cost/__tests__/extraction-cap.test.ts, green), the live cost cross-check is recorded in docs/COST_AND_ECONOMICS_AUDIT.md, findings logged in #445, control plane names #445 consistently, gate:continuity + typecheck pass. (Full P0.2 lazy-generation is explicitly deferred.)
anti_regression_checks: extraction-cap test green (default 0.25, env override honored)
typecheck clean; only lib/utils/api-tracker.ts changed under lib/
stop_condition: Stop when Pass 3 is merged, the Pass 3 box is checked in #445, and the next seam (P0.2 lazy generation, or Pass 2 Database) is named.
next_command: Next cost seam: P0.2 lazy/as-needed generation + P0.3 selective extraction (need design + paid validation). Or continue the audit at Pass 2 (Database & data integrity). Owner-side: enable Supabase leaked-password protection + MFA.
